base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of master_tile_atlas — a tile from 1988 mega man 2. 1352×1665 master atlas — all 8 RM stages + 6 Wily stages consolidated. Industrial/underwater/forest/cloud/laser-corridor tiles. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 1352×1665 master atlas — all 8 RM stages + 6 Wily stages consolidated. Industrial/underwater/forest/cloud/laser-corridor tiles
